mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.student_id AS studentId, s.email, s.first_name AS firstName, s.surname FROM student_subject ss LEFT JOIN student s ON s.id = ss.student_id WHERE ss.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND s.delete_status = 0 ORDER BY s.student_id
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.role AS role, u.username AS userName FROM user_subject us JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND u.role = 2
